data.name: Lonely Christmas: Sadistic Femdom Punishment
data.detailed_description:
On the North Pole, there exists a secret civilization run by Santa who's purpose is to spread the Christmas spirit. You're one of Santa's helpers whose job is to place presents under the Christmas trees of humans. However, you were seen by a human, and now Santa's most sadistic second-in-command is in charge of your brutal punishment. Will you be able to endure her cruel sadism for an entire night?

  • Full nudity H-Scenes

  • 4.7K+ words

  • Censored & uncensored mode

  • 14 Unique character images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Santa's sadistic femdom-obsessed second-in-command has been ordered to brutally punish you. Will you be able to endure her cruel sadism for an entire night?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
